caption: A man wearing a black hoodie, a grey undershirt, and large over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio against a background of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels. He is positioned behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Initially, he looks forward with a neutral, attentive expression. As the scene progresses, he turns his head to his right and breaks into a smile, looking toward someone or something off-camera. His expression shifts from focused to amused and lighthearted. In the final moments, while maintaining his smile and gaze to the right, he raises his left hand into the frame, gesturing with his fingers. No on-screen text or logos are visible throughout the sequence.
